Field Identification Key · 7 Species

Game Birds of Louisiana

Interactive dichotomous key — answer questions step by step to identify any quail, turkey, or dove you encounter

Identify Your Bird

This key guides you through a series of binary choices — each question narrows down the possibilities until you reach a species identification. This guide covers 7 Louisiana quail, turkey, and doves — from common species to less-frequent migrants, winter visitors, and specialty species. Each species lists its typical Louisiana season alongside habitat, silhouette, bill shape, and behavior.

One introduced species is included (Eurasian Collared-Dove), now common and increasing throughout Louisiana.
